overall.description: First-person perspective from a bus driver's cabin in a bus simulator game, navigating through heavy rain on wet urban streets. The bus makes several turns at intersections while windshield wipers actively clear rain from the windshield, with traffic lights and other vehicles visible through the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial road with traffic bollards

agents.ego_description: driving straight on wet multi-lane road, maintaining steady speed with traffic flow

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: driver control panel with multiple digital screens, gauges, and control buttons
active wipers moving back and forth clearing heavy rain from front windshield
red and white striped bollards separating the bus lane from main traffic
rain-slicked asphalt with water reflections and spray from tires
multi-story commercial buildings with glass and concrete facades

segments.scene_description: The bus drives straight along a wet multi-lane urban road in heavy rain. Windshield wipers actively clear the view while red and white traffic bollards line the right side. A silver sedan drives ahead in the same direction, and commercial buildings are visible through the rain on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with right turn maneuver

events.description: bus begins right turn at intersection, steering into the curve

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn at the intersection, slowing down for the curve

entered.detail: paved intersection area with crosswalk markings and traffic signs

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches and navigates a right turn at an urban intersection. The vehicle slows down to execute the turn, with the intersection zone opening up ahead. The traffic bollards from the previous segment pass behind as the bus enters the turn.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential street with parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: driving straight along street lined with parked cars on the right side

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles including sedans and SUVs along the right curb
mixed-use apartment buildings with ground floor storefronts

segments.scene_description: Continuing straight after the turn, the bus travels along a street lined with parked cars on the right. Residential and mixed-use buildings line both sides of the road, while the windshield wipers maintain visibility through the persistent heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection approach with left turn and traffic control

events.description: bus executes left turn at intersection
bus stops at red traffic light at intersection

agents.ego_description: making left turn at intersection then approaching and stopping at red traffic light

notable_agents.action: oncoming car waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light facing the bus
paved cross street forming the intersection

segments.scene_description: The bus executes a left turn at an intersection, then approaches and stops at a red traffic light. The parked cars from the previous street are left behind as the bus enters the intersection zone. An oncoming vehicle waits at the cross street while the bus waits for the light to change.

events.description: traffic light turns green and bus proceeds through intersection

agents.ego_description: accelerating through intersection after traffic light changes to green

entered.detail: traffic signs and poles marking the intersection

segments.scene_description: The traffic light changes to green and the bus accelerates through the intersection. The vehicle continues straight on the multi-lane road, leaving the cross street behind. Road signs are visible on the right as the bus proceeds through the rainy urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin navigating a rain-slicked urban environment through a series of city turns. It begins driving straight along a multi-lane road past red and white bollards and commercial buildings, with windshield wipers constantly clearing the heavy downpour. As the bus slows to execute a right turn, the scene shifts from the open road to a narrower street lined with parked cars and residential buildings. The camera then follows a left turn into another intersection, where the vehicle comes to a halt at a red light while an oncoming car waits across the street. Finally, the light turns green and the bus accelerates forward, leaving the intersection behind to proceed along a multi-lane road marked by roadside signs under the persistent rain.
